channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Why your mobile app feels slow even when it shouldn't
item.description: Cut cold-start by 49% and frame time by 32% with these fixes — mobile performance, real device profiling, and the mistakes that hide 200 ms stalls.

item.title: Slow SQL Queries Explained: Identifying and Fixing 80% of Performance Issues

item.description: Cut How Indie Hackers Are Making $10K/Month failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a step-…

item.title: Agile isn’t a meeting schedule — here’s what we cut instead
item.description: Cut cycle time from 18 days to 5 days and reduced production incidents by 75% by replacing Agile theatre with outcome-driven delivery. Learn how we moved from sprints and standups to asynchronous updates and pre-mortems while saving $120k in six months.

item.title: Free AI tools fail on real files (and what actually works)
item.description: ge for 15–20% of the files. One tool even c with AI Tools — a free AI summarizer and it returns a blank page or.

item.title: How Twilio and Stripe quietly print $3B a year with APIs you already use
item.description: Twilio and Stripe print $3B+ a year with APIs you already use — cut your API cost to $0.00042 per message with real code, latency under 100ms, and the failure modes that crash systems when you copy-paste a tutorial without reading the fine print.

item.title: How Amazon’s One-Click Patent Changed E-Commerce Tech Forever
item.description: with a 0.0013% oversell rate—mostly due to r with Amazon One-Click Patent Changed — a saved address.

item.title: Building AI Agents That Actually Work: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Building AI Agents That Actually Work failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a step-by…

item.title: How we raised SaaS prices 15% and lost no customers
item.description: Raised SaaS prices 15% and lost no customers — new customer ARPA jumped from $118 to $147, churn dropped from 11% to 4%, and infra costs fell from $18 to $14 per customer by grandfathering existing plans and adding a usage calculator. Pricing page redesign and narrative framing matter more than the number itself.

item.title: My Node.js API leaks memory under 100 req/sec—here’s how I fixed it
item.description: Cut Node.js API response time by 40% and eliminate heap OOM crashes under 100 req/sec — async middleware, object pooling, and Kubernetes memory limits that actually work

item.title: How Senior Developers Think Differently: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut How Senior Developers Think Differently failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a step-…

item.title: AI Worsens Wealth Inequality: 3 Hidden Feedback Loops Explained
item.description: Discover how 3 AI feedback loops turn small advantages into massive wealth gaps — with code to break them. Stop extracting from the poor while claiming to democratize wealth.

item.title: Infrastructure as Code vs Manual Scripts: Outage Causes Compared
item.description: IaC cuts deployment time by 62% and debugging time by 88% compared to manual scripts — and prevents 80% of drift-related outages. See how Terraform, Pulumi, and AWS CDK compare to Bash scripts for DevOps risk and ROI.

item.title: Web Accessibility: The Laws and the Code: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Web Accessibility: The Laws and the Code failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a step…

item.title: 11 ways to stop corporations from harvesting your personal data (2026 ranked list)
item.description: Reduce tracking leakage from 1.2 MB to 0.02 MB with Brave, uBlock Origin, and Firefox containers—no enterprise tools required. Stop corporations from harvesting your personal data with practical, ranked tools for every budget.

item.title: Automated Tools vs Manual Hacking: Real Attack Paths
item.description: Cut incident response time by 70% with automated hacking defenses and save $55k/year vs manual teams — the real attack paths used in Nigeria, Kenya, and East Africa with concrete tools, costs, and benchmarks.

item.title: Rust in Production: Why Python and JS Devs Are Switching Now
item.description: Cut API latency from 420ms to 18ms and memory from 2.1GB to 320MB by rewriting a Node.js app in Rust. Learn the real differences, gotchas, and tools that make Rust worth the switch for Python and JavaScript developers.

item.title: Python CPU profiling shows 95% idle—here’s why it’s lying
item.description: Cut Python endpoint latency from 4.2s to 650ms by fixing connection pools, CPU serialization, and CPU throttling — with exact commands, benchmarks, and CI checks to prevent regressions.

item.title: AI apps without machine learning knowledge finally explained
item.description: Ship AI features in under 1.2s latency and $15/month using cloud APIs and open models — prompt engineering, vector search, and cost tricks that pros use
